title: ProductLaunchIntake
description: Schema for triaging new feature releases and product launches to assess legal, privacy, and regulatory risk.

feature.description: The name of the new feature or product capability.

owner.description: The product manager or lead responsible for the launch.

customerSegment.description: Target customers (e.g. Enterprise, SMB, B2C, Regulated Markets).

jurisdictions.description: Target regions or jurisdictions for the feature (e.g. US, EU, UK, global).

dataInvolved.description: Any new user or system data categories collected or processed.

aiFeatures.description: Underlying models or AI services used (e.g. Gemini 1.5 Pro, local fine-tuned LLM).

publicClaims.description: Marketing claims, performance benchmarks, or accuracy assertions being published (e.g. '99% accurate on medical coding').

customerCommitmentsAffected.description: Any existing customer-specific SLAs or custom contract terms affected by this feature.

privacyImpact.description: Assessment of privacy considerations, consent flows, or DPIA requirements.

contractImpact.description: Whether the new feature requires updating standard MSAs, order forms, or DPAs.

regulatoryImpact.description: Compliance implications under EU AI Act, MiCAR, DORA, CCPA, or HIPAA.

requiredApprovals.description: Mandatory internal sign-offs needed before launch (e.g. Security, DPO, VP Product).
